task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the tax documents and business scenario.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a file explorer, PDF viewer, or text editor open to the directory 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\tremblay\' or displaying the contents of the files within it.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the StudioTax 2024 application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the StudioTax 2024 application window open and active on the desktop.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent created a return for Marc Tremblay.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing 'Marc Tremblay' entered into the personal information section, taxpayer profile wizard, or visible at the top of the active return in StudioTax.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the tax and business scenario data into the return.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing active data entry into tax forms within StudioTax (e.g., T2125 for contractor income, T2038, or CCA/ZEV schedules) with values populated.

task_completion.description: Verify the completed return is saved to the correct location with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the StudioTax 'Save As' dialog saving the file as 'marc_tremblay.24t' in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\', or a File Explorer window showing the successfully saved '.24t' file in that exact directory.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the StudioTax 2024 GUI to complete the return.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the StudioTax interface, clicking through forms, and typing data, rather than using a script or terminal to generate the file.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass saving through the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows should not show commands like 'cp', 'mv', or 'touch' being used to place a '.24t' file into the target directory.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not copy an already completed tax return file from another location.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be seen manually entering data into StudioTax and saving it, rather than copying an existing 'marc_tremblay.24t' file from a hidden or external folder.
